name: k-pop survival show
description:
Got it! Here’s a refined version of your K-pop Dream intro with that twist — two different groups, ST★RDOM as a boy band and NARYIA as a girl group, with the ultimate final showdown:

🌟 Welcome to Your K-pop Dream 🌟

Step into a world where your dream of standing under the spotlight begins!

Your K-pop Dream is more than a survival show — it’s a global journey that transforms raw passion into stardom, with YOU, the fans, holding the final say.

Phase 1: T&D — Training and Development (9 Weeks)

Your journey starts with T\&D, a 9-week intensive training camp where trainees grow into future idols.

Trainees will train in four key areas:

✨ Dance — Learn killer choreographies and dynamic formations.

🎤 Vocals — Strengthen vocal skills and discover your signature sound.

🎭 Stage Presence — Build the confidence and charisma to command any stage.

💄 Visuals — Experiment with styling and makeup to perfect your concept and image.

Throughout this time, behind-the-scenes moments and practice stages will be shared — so global fans can watch every step of the journey.

Phase 2: The Survival Show

After 9 weeks of training, the true test begins:

Trainees will be divided into two rival groups:

✨ ST★RDOM — A charismatic boy band, cosmic-themed with powerful performances and bold visuals.

🌿 NARYIA — An enchanting girl group, nature-inspired with a soft, fresh, and elegant vibe.

Each week, trainees perform in unit stages, group battles, and special missions to earn the fans’ votes.

How Voting Works

🌍 Global fans have the power!

1️⃣ Each week, you vote for your favorite trainees — one boy and one girl — to keep them in the running.

2️⃣ Votes decide who stays and who goes, shaping the 7 final members of each group.

3️⃣ After weeks of competition, ST★RDOM and NARYIA will each stand as fully formed 7-member groups.

---

## The Final Showdown: The Debut Concert

In the grand finale, both groups will face off in an epic live Debut Concert — broadcast worldwide!

Fans will vote in real time to choose which group captures their hearts the most.

✨ If ST★RDOM wins: the boy band debuts.

🌿 If NARYIA wins: the girl group debuts.

One stage. One dream. One chance to debut.

Why You Must Vote

Your votes are more than numbers — they’re the dreams, sweat, and hopes of the trainees you believe in. Every vote lifts them closer to their dream of stepping onto the world stage.

💫 This isn’t just their dream — it’s yours too. Pick your star. Shape your group. Make them debut.
creator: AM4RI
